/* To prevent any potential data loss issues, you should review this script in detail before running it outside the context of the database designer.*/
BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
CREATE TABLE dbo.STG_AccessProfile
	(
	Id int NOT NULL IDENTITY (1, 1),
	MainAccessProfileId int NOT NULL,
	ModuleActivated bit NOT NULL,
	AccessProfiles bit NOT NULL,
	AccessProfilesCreate bit NOT NULL,
	AccessProfilesUpdate bit NOT NULL,
	AccessProfilesDelete bit NOT NULL
	)  ON [PRIMARY]
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.STG_AccessProfile ADD CONSTRAINT
	PK_STG_AccessProfile PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED 
	(
	Id
	) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]

GO
CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_STG_AccessProfile ON dbo.STG_AccessProfile
	(
	MainAccessProfileId
	) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.STG_AccessProfile SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.STG_AccessProfile', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.STG_AccessProfile', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.STG_AccessProfile', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per 



















/* To prevent any potential data loss issues, you should review this script in detail before running it outside the context of the database designer.*/
BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.STG_AccessProfile ADD
	Users bit NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_STG_AccessProfile_Users DEFAULT 0,
	UsersCreate bit NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_STG_AccessProfile_UsersCreate DEFAULT 0,
	UsersDelete bit NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_STG_AccessProfile_UsersDelete DEFAULT 0,
	UsersUpdate bit NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_STG_AccessProfile_UsersUpdate DEFAULT 0
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.STG_AccessProfile SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.STG_AccessProfile', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.STG_AccessProfile', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.STG_AccessProfile', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per
